Goniothalamus discolor, commonly known as Gonogona discolor, is a plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The bioactive constituents of Goniothalamus discolor include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Goniothalamus discolor include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
